calendar.matters:
Ntc Of Hrg On Petition To Confirm Arb Award
Off Calendar Nov-19-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. EZEKIEL D. CARDER OF THE WEINBERG ROGER & ROSENFELD LAW FIRM, TEL. NO. (510)337-1001 APPEARING FOR THE PETITIONER;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PETITIONER THE BOARD OF TRUSTEES, IN THEIR CAPACITIES AS TRUSTEES OF THE CARPENTERS HEALTH AND WELFARE TRUST FUND FOR CALIFORNIA'S Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award is granted. No opposition filed. In addition, the Court awards reasonable attorney fees in the amount of $825.00 and costs in the amount of $1,383.68. ORDER AND JUDGMENT SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Sheryl L. Sawyer, CSR # 5976 =302/mjm
